MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-18-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Dec-05-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Janet Brown, Esq. for Plaintiff: Pacific Bell Directory.
Federick Northrop, Esq. for Defendant: Joe Wang dba Joe Wang Carpet & Flooring.
10:15 a.m.- Parties reached a settlement. Terms of the settlement were read into the record in open court as follows: Settlement in the sum of $16,500.00.
First payment of $2,000.00 by Cashier Check on or before Oct. 22, 2004, 23 monthly installment payments of $500.00 starting on Nov. 20, 2004, payments to be sent to Plaintiff's counsel within 5 days of the due date, the balance of $3,000.00 to be paid as the last installment payment.
Parties agreed to terms in open court.
Matter is deemed settled and trial date vacated.
